Reviews Contact

Client Reviews

5.0/5 average rating from 6+ happy clients

What Our Clients Say

Real feedback from homeowners and businesses who trust Summit Auto Body to get the job done right.

“Summit fixed the salt damage on my truck's wheel wells perfectly. They even showed me where to apply extra wax to prevent future issues. The color match is spot-on—you'd never know there was work done.”

Mark T. Rust repair on 2012 F-150
Mar 15, 2025

“After the July hailstorm dented my Prius all over, Summit's PDR tech had it looking new again in one day. Saved me from using my insurance deductible. They pointed out two tiny dents I hadn't even noticed.”

Lisa H. Hail damage repair
Feb 28, 2025

“When a plow truck slid into my parked Accord in Bay View, Summit handled everything—including dealing with the driver's insurance. The repair looks factory fresh, and they detailed the whole car afterward.”

Carlos R. Collision repair
Jan 10, 2025

“Fixed my scratched BMW bumper after a Third Ward parking mishap. The texture match is perfect, and they had it done in 24 hours. Cheaper than my insurance deductible would've been.”

Sarah K. Bumper repair
Dec 5, 2024

“Hit a curb on Bluemound Road during an ice storm. Summit's frame machine and alignment check got my Subaru driving straight again. They explained every step clearly.”

James P. Frame straightening
Nov 18, 2024

“Removed a door ding from the Bayshore parking lot without any paintwork. Can't even tell where it was. The technician showed me exactly how he did it—no pressure to upsell anything.”

Aisha B. Paintless dent repair
Oct 22, 2024
Summit Auto Body

Trusted auto body professionals serving Milwaukee, WI and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
